textByHash.08691fbb70c214cd2f9b4c33333ff2aeb6ae0774: Oh, no, I think she's gone away. Did I put her off?
textByHash.0a8df56c473759572f8e27cad2e296e4448119d0: Perhaps you can find the mermaid and tell her I'm very sorry I was rude to her. Then maybe she'll lift the curse.
textByHash.0f94b4ab9de6223eefb8586d1ade3eb0bd02991b: It sounds like there isn't a curse after all! Maybe I'll recover soon from whatever he did to me.
textByHash.141852090cea7fcce57d889abfa229f122c77a38: I hope she's not angry. Ithoi says mermaids can be dangerous.
textByHash.162a11502fa07190b5dce90165b333bc11ef54c5: What lands lie beyond the dim horizon, I wonder...
textByHash.1a0293cdfea6e1755b355cfb8a6c6d586aa1e1b9: Hello again. Coming back to Corsair Cove?
textByHash.1ad9598c047618fb33beb40ce512c24c0863fea8: That can't be right - he looks as sick as the rest of us. Maybe he's delerious and doesn't know what he's saying.
textByHash.1b568c5c465af684a4b850665429e13d3e41cd5c: I can see you moving your arms, but it's very dark. Are you waving to me?
textByHash.1c26d62a510c630c6f78eb5d11a8b7d354461328: What was that? I'd better have another look.
textByHash.2561f9d13dd3e7da23e0bb73ca5e2cf09b0778cc: Oh dear, oh dear. Maybe we'll be cursed forever!
textByHash.2e674960d8bec225a326daf38a1fa1b95f2a1b89: Who'd have thought Ithoi would do such a thing? I guess if there isn't really a curse, I'll get better soon. In fact I feel better already.
textByHash.3301bcd9dfa639140cce011f661764738f90ab05: Yes, that's what it must be. Ithoi, the navigator, always told us to beware of curses.
textByHash.3ecb71bb7d66bb359d52714b3b220c54e0782ab0: I'm sorry! Tell her I'm sorry! Then maybe she'll make the pain stop...
textByHash.409ec346c77a53b2f454a6b956b65063e5cb9347: Have you found out how we all got cursed?
textByHash.55e4ad85080f16116948f71ee72de0b7d5ddf9dd: Maybe she doesn't like strangers shouting about her appearance and blowing kisses at her. That might have been rude of me.
textByHash.628cf2a04ceb8979512bbff2006c73fa646c986b: Ithoi always told us that bad things happen to sailors who get involved with mermaids, but I didn't believe him. I should have listened! But I'll tell you what happened...
textByHash.718777453396f85b7c79da9a9c4e1855fb0e93cb: Oh. Oh, I see. Okay... I guess that means I didn't upset a mermaid after all. So the curse isn't my fault! Thank you!
textByHash.777c124413cd507c66f4f1493c6227e61781ede4: It's so dark out there, but I think... ... yes, I'm quite sure...
textByHash.7acd02788bd8477bf23464879354681d6e7e6ac6: Well, I suppose we don't need a navigator these days, and he's not very good at anything else. But I don't see why that's got anything to do with the curse.
textByHash.80b9e373b196a97f1a7e8efb365f137626598a73: Then we all started feeling sick and clammy. That was when the Captain and Ithoi came back from their parlay, and Ithoi looked sick too.
textByHash.8a561dcd65dfd181145393e00987f96294b1013a: The Captain's letting me command his boat now I'm fully recovered. Did you want to leave?
textByHash.97a1d73af126ecd4009dd570d0add069f9e9cda6: That's right. Gnocci had cooked us some swordfish. It didn't taste as good as his usual cooking, but I didn't complain. The Captain doesn't like complainers.
textByHash.abb9ff2e36f44efb5292a5a194f9ee3f39d7959c: Have you found the mermaid yet? Will she forgive me?
textByHash.b4c2e77d18ae25cba0b183743ce6f6cb4d333645: Is that what I think it is?
textByHash.be22d6f8bcfb3b4936b73dd8ec039c6e1faefdbd: Have you solved the curse yet?
textByHash.bfbcd981e9591437ae85abdb70bb0e6bbd74a675: I was using Ithoi's telescope to look out at the sea, imagining the strange lands and fantastic creatures Ithoi's always telling us he's seen, and I saw her.
textByHash.c7ca1fc3c895f896b146ab7293e97aecb23e3a58: I'll be here. I'm not going anywhere while I feel so sick.
textByHash.c812cb109387a4b5866ca86ea8017ab5fd2a69e0: You're the most lovely person I've ever seen!
textByHash.c8566812ded7149797a981d9a7d478aee49dab65: Yes, that's what it must be. Ithoi, the navigator, always told us to beware of curses. You should talk to him - he really knows about these things.
textByHash.cc7d7f1e2160ac4ff585b003cb9f3f964ef82be9: I still feel awful. But I'm glad you've proven it wasn't my fault that we got cursed. I hope you can work out what brought it on us.
textByHash.d1d4c48d6576fdea640b81d4d1a057b74629aecc: Ithoi lives in the hut to the south-west, nearest to the sea.
textByHash.ec76f33aa2645425668259ec401aa73b486ce550: ... yes, it's a mermaid! She's beautiful!
textByHash.f8d6b784527f5ad3ff4acf9c8f14d6055d9815fd: This is all my fault. But I didn't mean to upset her. I just thought we could be friends. Now I must have upset her, and she's cursed us all!
